# Fish body mass at age estimation

A random effects model for estimating variance in weight-at-age.

## Package usage

\`\`\`{r} \# install.packages(“devtools”) \#
devtools::load_all(“WtAgeRe”)

library(WtAgeRe)

# Example: read predictions and plot anomalies

setwd(“examples/ebspollock”) pred \<- fn_get_pred(file = “wt”, dat =
NULL, source = “model”) fn_plot_anoms(pred) \`\`\`

## ADMB model

Examples are in `examples/`. Each example directory contains a
`Makefile` and `wt.tpl` for the ADMB model. Run `make` inside the
example directory to build and run the model.

# Package index

## All functions

- [`colr()`](https://afsc-assessments.github.io/WtAgeRe/reference/colr.md)
  : Transparent colors
- [`fn_get_pred()`](https://afsc-assessments.github.io/WtAgeRe/reference/fn_get_pred.md)
  : Get predicted weight-at-age
- [`fn_plot_anoms()`](https://afsc-assessments.github.io/WtAgeRe/reference/fn_plot_anoms.md)
  : Plot weight-at-age anomalies
- [`read_admb()`](https://afsc-assessments.github.io/WtAgeRe/reference/read_admb.md)
  : Read ADMB output files
- [`read_ctl()`](https://afsc-assessments.github.io/WtAgeRe/reference/read_ctl.md)
  : Read ADMB .ctl file
- [`read_dat()`](https://afsc-assessments.github.io/WtAgeRe/reference/read_dat.md)
  : Read ADMB data files
- [`read_fit()`](https://afsc-assessments.github.io/WtAgeRe/reference/read_fit.md)
  : Read ADMB .par, .std, and .cor file and return an R object of type
  'list' of estimates and correlations
- [`read_psv()`](https://afsc-assessments.github.io/WtAgeRe/reference/read_psv.md)
  : Read ADMB .psv file
- [`read_rep()`](https://afsc-assessments.github.io/WtAgeRe/reference/read_rep.md)
  : Read ADMB .rep file
- [`replace_zeros_with_mean()`](https://afsc-assessments.github.io/WtAgeRe/reference/replace_zeros_with_mean.md)
  : Replace outliers with mean for mean weight-at-age
- [`replace_zeros_with_two()`](https://afsc-assessments.github.io/WtAgeRe/reference/replace_zeros_with_two.md)
  : Replace zeros with near-two for SD
- [`write_dat()`](https://afsc-assessments.github.io/WtAgeRe/reference/write_dat.md)
  : Write ADMB data file
